build.description: Default build agent for coding tasks

plan.description: Planning agent for architecture and design

reviewer.description: Code review specialist. Use for PR reviews and quality checks.

tester.description: Testing specialist. Use for writing and running tests.

docs.description: Documentation specialist. Use for README, docs, and changelogs.

quiz-admin.description: Quiz admin specialist. Use for evaluating sessions, generating reports, and sending results.

tutorial-admin.description: Tutorial admin specialist. Use for viewing reports, managing completions, and tracking participant progress.

key-mgmt-admin.description: Key management admin specialist. Use for multi-person key management, access control, and approval workflows.

survey-admin-agent.description: Survey admin specialist. Use for survey reports, statistics, and survey bank management.

test.description: Run test suite for current project
test.template: Run the test suite for this project. First detect the test framework, then run all tests and report results.

deploy.template: Deploy the current project. Check the project type and deployment config, then execute the appropriate deploy command.

commit.template: Stage all changes and create a conventional commit with an appropriate type and scope based on the changes.

plan.description: Generate a detailed requirements plan in plans/ with TDD philosophy
plan.template: Create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS. Follow the TDD process: understand the request, research the codebase, create a plan document in plans/<auto-number>-<feature-slug>-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with objective, requirements, architecture decisions, file changes, TDD flow, and verification steps. The auto-number is the next sequential number in plans/, and the date is today's date. Write failing tests first, then implement, then verify.

quiz-create.description: Create a new question bank for quizzes or surveys
quiz-create.template: Load the quiz-bank skill and create a new question bank. Ask for: bank name, ID, version, and whether it's a quiz or survey. Initialize the bank file in quiz/banks/.

quiz-register.template: Load the quiz-participant skill and register participants. Offer single registration or bulk CSV import.

quiz-practice.description: Run a practice quiz with immediate feedback
quiz-practice.template: Load the quiz skill and run a practice quiz. Identify the participant, select bank and difficulty, present questions one by one with immediate feedback after each answer. Save results as practice mode. IMPORTANT: Always use custom:false on every question tool call that has options.

quiz-run.description: Run a live quiz with results saved
quiz-run.template: Load the quiz skill and run a live quiz. Identify the participant, select bank and difficulty, present questions one by one with no feedback. Save results as live mode for evaluation. IMPORTANT: Always use custom:false on every question tool call that has options.

quiz-report.description: Generate admin report for quiz sessions
quiz-report.template: Load the quiz-admin skill and generate a report. Ask which bank to report on, show per-question stats and participant scores.

quiz-send.description: Send quiz results to participants via email
quiz-send.template: Load the quiz-results skill and send results. Ask which bank/session, list recipients, confirm before sending.

quiz-migrate.description: Migrate a legacy bank.json into the new bank/key format
quiz-migrate.template: Load the quiz-bank skill and migrate a legacy bank. Read bank.json, split into banks/ and keys/ files, validate both.

quiz-install.description: Install the quiz and testing system to a directory. Usage: /quiz-install <target-dir>
quiz-install.template: Load the quiz-install skill. The user provided the target directory: $ARGUMENTS. If no directory was provided, ask the user. Follow the skill workflow: dry-run preview, confirm, install.

quiz-install-update.description: Update an existing quiz/testing installation. Usage: /quiz-install-update <target-dir>
quiz-install-update.template: The installed path is: $ARGUMENTS. If not provided, ask the user. Run node quiz/cli/install.js --dir <path> to re-copy all files, overwriting existing ones. Report the number of files updated.

survey.description: Check pending surveys and submit answers. Usage: /survey
survey.template: Load the survey skill with the skill tool FIRST. Identify the participant, check which surveys are pending, list them (with custom:false on the question tool), let the user select one, present questions, save results to surveys/results/, and confirm. IMPORTANT: Always use custom:false on every question tool call that has options.

tutorial.description: Run an interactive tutorial with gamification and branching. Usage: /tutorial [nombre-tutorial]
tutorial.template: Load the tutorial skill. List available tutorials from tutorials/banks/. Let the user select one, then run it step by step using the question tool for interactive steps, bash for code exercises, and read/write for challenges. Track XP, streaks, and achievements. IMPORTANT: Always use custom:false on every question tool call that has options.

tutorial-create.description: Create a new interactive tutorial. Usage: /tutorial-create [--name "Nombre"] [--id id]
tutorial-create.template: Load the tutorial-create skill. Ask for tutorial name, id, difficulty, and duration if not provided. Create the tutorial shell, add steps, create answer key, and validate.

tutorial-report.description: View tutorial completion reports and participant progress. Usage: /tutorial-report [--participant ID] [--tutorial nombre]
tutorial-report.template: Load the tutorial-admin skill. Show completion reports, participant progress, and global statistics from the tutorial registry.

key-mgmt.description: Multi-person key management — access control, approvals, and team key lifecycle. Usage: /key-mgmt
key-mgmt.template: Load the quiz-key-mgmt skill. Detect user role from team.json, then present the appropriate menu (admin vs member). Use the question tool for all interactions.

survey-report.description: Generate survey admin reports — statistics, breakdowns, CSV export. Usage: /survey-report
survey-report.template: Load the survey-admin skill. List available survey banks, let user select one, generate report, and offer CSV export.

survey-create.description: Create a new survey question bank — no answer keys needed. Usage: /survey-create
survey-create.template: Load the survey-bank skill. Ask for survey name and ID, create bank with --type survey, add questions interactively, validate, and set visibility.

tutorial-key.description: Create and manage tutorial answer keys. Usage: /tutorial-key
tutorial-key.template: Load the tutorial-key skill. List available tutorials, create key from bank, add answers for scorable steps, validate key.
